wrong_choice_explanations.を: を is the direct object particle — it doesn't work with ほしい which requires が for the desired item.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction, time, or target — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates means, location, or material — it doesn't mark what you want with ほしい.

wrong_choice_explanations.は: は is the topic particle — while sometimes substitutable, が is the correct particle for the desired object with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.も: も means 'also/too' — it doesn't properly mark the desired object in this context.
wrong_choice_explanations.と: と means 'and/with' — it doesn't mark what you want with ほしい.

wrong_choice_explanations.へ: へ indicates direction 'towards' — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.から: から means 'from/because' — it doesn't mark what you want with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.まで: まで means 'until/up to' — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.

exercises.example_sentence: 子供の時、犬__ほしかった。
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I wanted a dog.

wrong_choice_explanations.の: の is the possessive particle — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.や: や means 'and' (for incomplete lists) — it doesn't mark what you want with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.か: か indicates questions or alternatives — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.

exercises.example_sentence: 今度の誕生日には本__ほしいです。
exercises.translation: For my next birthday, I want books.

wrong_choice_explanations.ばかり: ばかり means 'only/just' — while it can follow が, it doesn't replace the が needed with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.だけ: だけ means 'only' — while it can follow が, it doesn't replace the が particle required with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.しか: しか means 'only' (with negative) — it doesn't work in this positive context with ほしい.

exercises.example_sentence: コーヒー__ほしくありません。

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が normally marks the desired object with ほしい, but は is preferred in negative sentences for emphasis.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects — it doesn't work with ほしい which requires は or が.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction or target — it doesn't mark the unwanted object with ほしい.

exercises.example_sentence: プレゼント__何がほしいですか。
exercises.translation: What do you want as a present?

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が marks the desired item, but は marks the topic 'as for presents' in this context.
wrong_choice_explanations.を: を marks direct objects — it doesn't work with ほしい or for marking topics.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates means or location — it doesn't mark the topic in this question structure.

exercises.example_sentence: 彼女は新しい服__ほしがっている。

wrong_choice_explanations.が: が works with ほしい for first person, but third person ほしがる requires を for the desired object.
wrong_choice_explanations.に: に indicates direction or target — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしがる.
wrong_choice_explanations.で: で indicates means or location — it doesn't mark what someone wants with ほしがる.

exercises.example_sentence: もっと時間__ほしいなあ。
exercises.translation: I wish I had more time.

wrong_choice_explanations.こそ: こそ means 'precisely/exactly' for emphasis — it doesn't replace the が particle needed with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.さえ: さえ means 'even' — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.すら: すら means 'even' (emphatic) — it doesn't mark what you want with ほしい.

exercises.example_sentence: 静かな場所__ほしいです。

wrong_choice_explanations.より: より means 'than' for comparison — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.ほど: ほど means 'to the extent of' — it doesn't mark what you want with ほしい.
wrong_choice_explanations.など: など means 'and so on/such as' — it doesn't mark the desired object with ほしい.
